description: A proof-of-concept application built with React, TypeScript, and Vite for managing and validating matching data between silos. It features robust authentication via Microsoft MSAL (Azure AD).

architecture_overview.auth_flow: Users must authenticate via MSAL before accessing protected routes. Token-based session management is handled globally.
architecture_overview.routing: Protected routes ensure only authenticated users can access the Home and Table pages.
architecture_overview.data_fetching: Uses a combination of static sample data (for batches) and dynamic API interaction for row-level updates (PATCH calls to 127.0.0.1:8020).

LoginPage.description: Entry point for authentication using Microsoft identity platform.

HomePage.description: Dashboard for users to view their 'Pending' and 'Validated' review batches. Batch details are shown using ReviewCards.
key_actions: Navigate to detailed review table via 'Validate' button

NewTable.description: The primary interaction hub where users review detailed silo matching data.
key_features: Global Validation: Toggle all 'Matched' records at once using the header checkbox.
Individual Validation: Checkbox for row-level validation (enabled only for Matched status).
Status Management: Update row status (Matched, To Review, Not Matched, Invalid) via dropdown.
LDC ID Editing: Click-to-edit LDC IDs directly in the table cells.
Infinite Scrolling: Performance-optimized long list rendering.
Visual Cues: Color-coded rows based on status (e.g., green for Matched, yellow for To Review) and greyed-out read-only/Invalid rows.

key_components.Header: Universal navigation component with page titles and subtitles.
key_components.ReviewCard: Component to display summary information for a batch of records on the Home page.
key_components.StatusSelect: Specialized dropdown for updating record statuses in the table.
key_components.LdcIdCell: Interactive cell for managing LDC ID strings with edit/save state.
